best_qa_per_chain.question: Woman in pink towel factory news
best_qa_per_chain.answer: The 'woman in pink' refers to Liudmila Zavada, a Russian national whose body was identified in Spain after being found over 20 years ago. She was known for her pink clothing and is believed to have died under suspicious circumstances. This identification was made by Interpol as part of an international effort to resolve cold cases.

citations.title: The woman in pink identified by Interpol 20 years later
‘Woman in pink’: Russian national’s body identified in Spain
After 20 Years, 'the Woman in Pink' Has a Name

best_qa_per_chain.question: nature reclaiming old machinery
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Nature often reclaims old machinery, as seen in various locations where abandoned equipment is overtaken by vegetation and natural processes. For example, old mining machinery at Jawbone Flats has been left to rust and decay, allowing the surrounding environment to envelop it. This phenomenon highlights the contrast between human-made structures and the resilience of nature.

citations.title: Old Mining Machinery at Opal Creek
Beautiful Abandonment: Nature Reclaims a Crumbling Iowa Brick

best_qa_per_chain.question: What did New Horizons capture on Pluto?
best_qa_per_chain.answer: New Horizons captured detailed images and data of Pluto and its moons during its flyby in July 2015. It provided insights into Pluto's surface features, including the icy plains of Sputnik Planitia and geological processes such as convection. The mission revealed Pluto's complex atmosphere and diverse geology, marking the first close exploration of this distant world.

citations.title: Five Years after New Horizons’ Historic Flyby, Here Are 10 Cool Things We Learned About Pluto
NASA Science New Horizons

best_qa_per_chain.question: Pluto equator mountain range July 14
best_qa_per_chain.answer: On July 14, 2015, NASA's New Horizons spacecraft made its closest approach to Pluto, revealing a range of snowcapped mountains at its equator. These mountains are covered in methane frost, which forms due to unique atmospheric processes on Pluto.

citations.title: Pluto has Snowcapped Mountains, But Why?
Methane snow found on the tops of Pluto's equatorial mountains
The CH4 cycles on Pluto over seasonal and astronomical timescales

best_qa_per_chain.question: Did NASA release Pluto image July 14?
best_qa_per_chain.answer: NASA did not release the Pluto image on July 14, 2015, but the New Horizons spacecraft made its closest approach to Pluto on that date. The images and data were later released during a briefing on July 17, 2015.

citations.title: New Horizons - Science@NASA
NASA to Release New Pluto Images, Science Findings at July 17 NASA TV Briefing

best_qa_per_chain.question: Johnny Depp Amber Heard relationship timeline
best_qa_per_chain.answer: Johnny Depp and Amber Heard met in 2009 while filming 'The Rum Diary'. They began dating in early 2012, got married in 2015, and divorced in 2016. Their relationship has been marked by legal battles, including a high-profile defamation trial in 2022.
